## Classification

```yaml
classification:
  risk_tier: R1

  critical_surfaces: []

  classified_by: "Miguel Ingram"
  classified_at: "2026-04-04T23:10:32Z"
```

## Claims

1. Unlinked evidence is consumed one-per-claim instead of applying the same artifact to every unenriched claim
2. Parser extracts Justification text from Class F evidence sections into claim.justification
3. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
4. check_justification uses claim.justification with fallback to claim.description instead of always-None field
5. Dead if-fix-or-True branch removed — SHA computation runs unconditionally as needed for quality checks
6. Pre-commit hook relies solely on exit code from aiv check instead of fragile stdout string matching
7. Config load_hook_config emits logging.warning on YAML type mismatch instead of silent fallback to defaults
8. Guard valid field simplified from redundant ternary to direct assignment
9. 11 new tests cover unlinked evidence consumption, Justification extraction, anti-cheat justification check, and pipeline anti-cheat end-to-end with diff

## Verification Methodology

**Zero-Touch Mandate:** Verifier inspects artifacts only.
Evidence was collected by `aiv commit` during the change lifecycle.
Packet generated by `aiv close`.

---

## Known Limitations

- Evidence references point to Layer 1 evidence files at specific commit SHAs.
  Use `git show <sha>:.github/aiv-evidence/<file>` to retrieve.

---

## Summary

Change 'critical-audit-fixes': 7 commit(s) across 7 file(s).
